# terrible_cisco_nxos_nxos_bfd_global (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `echo_interface` (String) Loopback interface used for echo frames. Valid values are loopback interface name or 'deleted'. Not supported on N5K/N6K
- `echo_rx_interval` (Number) BFD Echo receive interval in milliseconds.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `fabricpath_interval` (String) BFD fabricpath interval timer values. Value must be a dict defining values for keys (tx, min_rx, and multiplier).
- `fabricpath_slow_timer` (Number) BFD fabricpath slow rate timer in milliseconds.
- `fabricpath_vlan` (Number) BFD fabricpath control vlan.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `interval` (String) BFD interval timer values. Value must be a dict defining values for keys (tx, min_rx, and multiplier)
- `ipv4_echo_rx_interval` (Number) BFD IPv4 session echo receive interval in milliseconds.
- `ipv4_interval` (String) BFD IPv4 interval timer values. Value must be a dict defining values for keys (tx, min_rx, and multiplier).
- `ipv4_slow_timer` (Number) BFD IPv4 slow rate timer in milliseconds.
- `ipv6_echo_rx_interval` (Number) BFD IPv6 session echo receive interval in milliseconds.
- `ipv6_interval` (String) BFD IPv6 interval timer values. Value must be a dict defining values for keys (tx, min_rx, and multiplier).
- `ipv6_slow_timer` (Number) BFD IPv6 slow rate timer in milliseconds.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `slow_timer` (Number) BFD slow rate timer in milliseconds.
- `startup_timer` (Number) BFD delayed startup timer in seconds. Not supported on N5K/N6K/N7K
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cmds` (String) commands sent to the device
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
